title: Create Weaponry
description: Weapon making through molten metals w/ casts and custom weapons
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bab0be81e32d7ae64cc5852954c4efda9753c11d.webp)

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/651ab9a656c05eefd714de339d91a4972743d656.webp)


Molten Fluids from several metal types have been added to the game.
Tool and Weapon head casts have been added to the game.
Tool and Weapon heads have been added to the game.
 

4 new weapon types have been added to the game.
[ Glaive, Katana, Mace, Hammer ]
 

The mod is meant to be used in combination with the Create mod. The idea is that you use spouts as measures of pouring molten metals into their casts to craft tools and weapons.
 

If you have suggestions, feedback, and issues, please feel free to do some either in the comments or my discord channel.
 

![compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/315cfda0efdb0379ce80ae1093267f05db7c037e.webp)

Create,

Blue Skies,

Ad Astra,

 
![promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ea81f2303dbdf05c23c42edcfdb8448564e747a.webp)
 



 

The mod is inspired by Tinker's Construct, but implements it with Create machines.

 



 

 

 

It also reworks the recipes for normal tools to use tool heads for consistency sake

 

** Curent Bugs:

If Minecraft Recipes are not being overwritten, put this datapack into your world datapack folder and reload your world as a temporary fix until I fix the config.
